notes: African Grey weaning: 12-16 weeks. Time content launches so birds are ready when demand peaks. Christmas = highest demand; Spring Bird Season = highest volume.

peaks.name: Spring Bird Season
peaks.notes: Highest sustained demand. African Greys 12-16 weeks weaning — time content for March start. Clutch announcements in December/January.

peaks.name: Christmas
peaks.notes: Highest impulse gifting demand. Weaning caveat critical — many birds won't be ready by Dec 25. Blog angle: 'The gift that can't be rushed'.

peaks.name: Valentine's Day
peaks.notes: Pair-gifting angle. 'A companion for life' messaging.

peaks.name: Mother's Day
peaks.notes: May overlap with Spring Bird Season peak. Family + companion angle.

peaks.name: Summer
peaks.notes: Lower purchase demand. Focus on educational content (care guides, training, diet). Keep brand warm.

content_schema_reference.title: string
content_schema_reference.target_publish_date: ISO date string — when it goes live
content_schema_reference.file_path: string | null — path to built file once complete
